title: Cozmic's Vanilla Enhanced
description: A visual, performance, and vanilla tweak-filled pack meant to make playing Minecraft on the latest version better all while working on Vanilla Servers
body:
# **Cozmic's Vanilla Enhanced**
## About
This modpack focuses on making Minecraft look better, run faster, and feel smoother without changing the core vanilla gameplay. Every mod is carefully chosen to enhance immersion, performance, and quality of life while keeping the game familiar and stable.

This mod is designed to work on **Vanilla & Fabric Servers** with little to no issues. It was originally made for my own SMP server. 

This modpack contains optimization, visual, and "tweak" mods such as Sodium, Voxy, and Fast Trading, just to name a few. It also contains several popular Shader Packs such as Photon and Solas

## 🎯 Who This Modpack Is For
• Vanilla plus players
• Builders and redstone engineers
• Survival-focused worlds
• Anyone who wants Minecraft to feel modern and smooth

## ⚙️ Stability and Compatibility
• Carefully tested mod selection
• Multiplayer friendly
• Regularly updated for stability
• Minimal conflicts and crashes
